description.en: Change the mode of file descriptor fd to cbreak. If when is omitted, it defaults to termios.TCSAFLUSH, and is passed to termios.tcsetattr(). The return value of termios.tcgetattr() is saved before setting fd to cbreak mode; this value is returned. This clears the ECHO and ICANON local mode flags as well as setting the minimum input to 1 byte with no delay. Changed in version 3.12: The return value is now the original tty attributes, instead of None. Changed in version 3.12.2: The ICRNL flag i...

description.en: Change the mode of the file descriptor fd to raw. If when is omitted, it defaults to termios.TCSAFLUSH, and is passed to termios.tcsetattr(). The return value of termios.tcgetattr() is saved before setting fd to raw mode; this value is returned. Changed in version 3.12: The return value is now the original tty attributes, instead of None.
